settings.label: Logo
settings.info: Shown in the header. Leave empty to keep the original SVG logo from the Webflow export.

settings.label: Favicon
settings.info: 32×32 PNG recommended. Falls back to assets/favicon.png.

settings.label: Default social share image (Open Graph)
settings.info: 1200×630 recommended. Shown when a page is linked on Facebook/X/etc. and has no own share image set.

settings.content: Anything pasted here is emitted in <head> on every page, after the theme's stylesheets — so it can override Webflow CSS without touching the original files. Useful for one-off tweaks, brand-color overrides, or temporary styling changes.
Used by the footer's social icon row and the social meta tags. Leave a URL blank to hide that platform.
